name: lookup_ls_sonicstar_findAll_string
note: Expected divergence: tm_sonicstar / ls_sonicstar are not part of vanilla @bsv/overlay-express@2.2.0, so the reference returns a 'service not found' style error. Rust-overlay returns the proper findAll response when LOOKUP_SERVICES env contains ls_sonicstar. True byte parity for sonicstar is exercised in crates/overlay-cloudflare/tests/sonicstar_live_parity.rs against sonicstar.net /api/overlay-parity/lookup (step 10).
